Class TruthValueTracingUtil

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.TruthValueTracingUtil
public final class TruthValueTracingUtil extends Object
Provides functionality to evaluate the truth value of labeled formulas (predicates and junctors).

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    TruthValueTracingUtil.BranchResult
    Represents the unmodifiable predicate results of a leaf Node (Goal).
    static class 
    TruthValueTracingUtil.MultiEvaluationResult
    Instances of this unmodifyable class are used to store the found evaluation results.
    static enum 
    TruthValueTracingUtil.TruthValue
    Represents the possible truth values.
    static class 
    TruthValueTracingUtil.TruthValueTracingResult
    Represents the final predicate evaluation result returned by evaluate(Node, Name, boolean, boolean)

    evaluate(Node node, Name termLabelName, boolean useUnicode, boolean usePrettyPrinting)
    Evaluates the truth values in the subtree of the given Node for predicates labeled with the given TermLabel name.

  • Method Details

    • isPredicate

      public static boolean isPredicate(SequentFormula sequentFormula)
      Checks if the given SequentFormula is a predicate.
      Parameters:
      sequentFormula - The SequentFormula to check.
      Returns:
      true is predicate, false is something else.

    • isPredicate

      public static boolean isPredicate(Term term)
      Checks if the given JTerm is a predicate.
      Parameters:
      term - The JTerm to check.
      Returns:
      true is predicate, false is something else.

    • isPredicate

      public static boolean isPredicate(Operator operator)
      Checks if the given Operator is a predicate.
      Parameters:
      operator - The Operator to check.
      Returns:
      true is predicate, false is something else.

    • isLogicOperator

      public static boolean isLogicOperator(JTerm term)
      Checks if the given JTerm is a logical operator
      Parameters:
      term - The JTerm to check.
      Returns:
      true is logical operator, false is something else.

    • isLogicOperator

      public static boolean isLogicOperator(Operator operator, ImmutableArray<JTerm> subs)
      Checks if the given Operator and its sub JTerms specify a logical operator.
      Parameters:
      operator - The Operator.
      subs - The sub JTerms.
      Returns:
      true is logical operator, false is something else.

    • isIfThenElseFormula

      public static boolean isIfThenElseFormula(JTerm term)
      Checks if the given JTerm is an if-then-else formula.
      Parameters:
      term - The JTerm to check.
      Returns:
      true is if-then-else formula, false is something else.

    • isIfThenElseFormula

      public static boolean isIfThenElseFormula(Operator operator, ImmutableArray<JTerm> subs)
      Checks if the given Operator and its sub JTerms specify an if-then-else formula.
      Parameters:
      operator - The Operator.
      subs - The sub JTerms.
      Returns:
      true is if-then-else formula, false is something else.

    • evaluate

      public static TruthValueTracingUtil.TruthValueTracingResult evaluate(Node node, Name termLabelName, boolean useUnicode, boolean usePrettyPrinting) throws ProofInputException
      Evaluates the truth values in the subtree of the given Node for predicates labeled with the given TermLabel name.
      Parameters:
      node - The Node to start evaluation at.
      termLabelName - The Name of the TermLabel to consider.
      useUnicode - true use unicode characters, false do not use unicode characters.
      usePrettyPrinting - true use pretty printing, false do not use pretty printing.
      Returns:
      The result.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception
